items.caption: Two photographs of Carl Barks in 1932. In the left photo, he is standing outdoors in a suit and tie, holding a hat. In the right photo, he is smiling and wearing a hat with his suit.
items.md: ![Two photographs of Carl Barks in 1932. In the left photo, he is standing outdoors in a suit and tie, holding a hat. In the right photo, he is smiling and wearing a hat with his suit.](CBatAotCB-011_page_1_image_4_v2.jpg)
Carl Barks in 1932, when he was working for the *Calgary Eye Opener*.
items.value: Carl Barks in 1932, when he was working for the Calgary Eye Opener.

items.caption: A cartoon drawing by Carl Barks from 1935 showing a humorous interpretation of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs. Snow White looks distressed while the dwarfs are depicted as eccentric characters in a forest setting with a castle in the background. Signed "CARL BARKS '35".
items.md: ![A cartoon drawing by Carl Barks from 1935 showing a humorous interpretation of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs. Snow White looks distressed while the dwarfs are depicted as eccentric characters in a forest setting with a castle in the background. Signed "CARL BARKS '35".](CBatAotCB-011_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)
Barks sent this drawing of his conception of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs to the Disney studio when he applied for work in 1935.
items.value: Barks sent this drawing of his conception of Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs to the Disney studio when he applied for work in 1935.
